MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $511.20 FILED BY JUNGWIRTH, SANDY LEE AS TO DEFENDANT HAWKINS, JAMES T. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-06-2016 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
